name: Dulham
title: Guiding Wife
shortDescription: A pious woman who, with her impactful words, transformed her husband Zuhayr to rush to Imam Hussain's (AS) aid.
fullStory:
Dulham bint Amr was the loyal and pious wife of Zuhayr ibn Qayn. Zuhayr was initially considered a supporter of Uthman and, on his way back from Hajj, tried to avoid encountering Imam Hussain's (AS) caravan.

At one of the stops, Imam Hussain's (AS) messenger came to Zuhayr's tent and invited him to the Imam. Zuhayr was reluctant to go, and a heavy silence fell over the tent. At this historic moment, Dulham intervened with bravery and firm faith.

She turned to her husband and said: 'Glory be to God! The son of the Messenger of God calls you and you refuse to go? What would happen if you go and hear what he has to say?' Dulham's penetrating words acted as a spark in Zuhayr's soul, transforming him entirely.

Zuhayr went to meet the Imam, and when he returned, his face was glowing. He had decided to assist the Imam. Here, Dulham tearfully bid farewell to Zuhayr, saying: 'May God be your supporter. I ask you to remember me on the Day of Judgment in the presence of Hussain's (AS) grandfather.'

Dulham's role in Karbala demonstrated how an insightful woman can change her husband's destiny from Hell to the highest ranks of Paradise.
quoteArabic: سُبْحانَ اللَّهِ! أَيَبْعَثُ إِلَيْكَ ابْنُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ثُمَّ لا تَأْتِيهِ!؟
quote: Glory be to God! The son of the Messenger of God calls you and you refuse to go?!
